api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMAnimatedSymbolPro.summary: Class CIMAnimatedSymbolProperties Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Represents animated symbol properties, a collection of symbol properties that apply when the symbol layer has animation data. public class CIMAnimatedSymbolProperties : CIMObject, IJsonSerializable Inheritance object CIMObject CIMAnimatedSymbolProperties Implements IJsonSerializable Inherited Members CIMObject.ArrayFromJson(string, JsonDeserializationSettings) CIMObject.JsonFromArray(CIMObject[], JsonSerializationSettings) object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ToString() object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() Constructors CIMAnimatedSymbolProperties() public CIMAnimatedSymbolProperties() Properties Duration Gets or sets how many seconds it takes to play through the symbol's animation once. This determines a symbol's playback speed. public double Duration { get; set; } Property Value double Easing Gets or sets the animation's easing. Only applicable on non file-based animations. public AnimatedSymbolEasingType Easing { get; set; } Property Value AnimatedSymbolEasingType EndingDuration Gets or sets the ending duration of a symbol for time-aware data interpolation. The symbol's playback speed is interpolated linearly from duration to endingDuration over the display period of a time-aware feature. public double EndingDuration { get; set; } Property Value double PlayAnimation Gets or sets a value indicating whether the animated symbol should play its animation. public bool PlayAnimation { get; set; } Property Value bool PrimitiveName Gets or sets the primitive name. public string PrimitiveName { get; set; } Property Value string RandomizeStartSeed Gets or sets the starting value for generating a random number. This random number is used by the randomizeStartTime property to determine time offset for each feature. public long RandomizeStartSeed { get; set; } Property Value long RandomizeStartTime Gets or sets a value indicating whether to generate a randomized start offset in seconds to apply to the symbol animation of each feature. public bool RandomizeStartTime { get; set; } Property Value bool RepeatDelay Gets or sets the number of seconds to delay before repeating an animation cycle. public double RepeatDelay { get; set; } Property Value double RepeatType Gets or sets how to repeat the animation of a symbol when an animation cycle ends. public AnimatedSymbolRepeatType RepeatType { get; set; } Property Value AnimatedSymbolRepeatType ReverseAnimation Gets or sets a value indicating whether the animated symbol should playback in reverse. public bool ReverseAnimation { get; set; } Property Value bool StartTimeOffset Gets or sets the time offset in seconds to use as the starting point of the symbol animation. This is used if randomizeStartTime=false. public double StartTimeOffset { get; set; } Property Value double UseEndingDuration Gets or sets a value indicating whether to use the ending duration of a symbol for time-aware data interpolation. public bool UseEndingDuration { get; set; } Property Value bool Methods FromJson(string, JsonDeserializationSettings) Reconstructs the CIMAnimatedSymbolProperties with a specified state from a JSON encoding. public static CIMAnimatedSymbolProperties FromJson(string json, JsonDeserializationSettings settings = null) Parameters json string The JSON string containing the CIMAnimatedSymbolProperties state. settings JsonDeserializationSettings The JSON deserialization settings. api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMCallout.html.title: Class CIMCallout | EnterpriseSDK
api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMCallout.html.summary: Class CIMCallout Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Represents a callout. public abstract class CIMCallout : CIMObject, IJsonSerializable Inheritance object CIMObject CIMCallout Implements IJsonSerializable Derived CIMBalloonCallout CIMCompositeCallout CIMLineCallout CIMSimpleLineCallout Inherited Members CIMObject.ArrayFromJson(string, JsonDeserializationSettings) CIMObject.JsonFromArray(CIMObject[], JsonSerializationSettings) CIMObject.ToJson(JsonSerializationSettings) object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ToString() object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() Remarks Callouts are used to define additional ornamentation for a symbol. The primary use for callouts is to add leader line capabilities to text. Callouts are also used for defining items such as highway shields, balloon callouts, and more complex text box and leader line combinations. All callouts have some capability to draw leader lines; therefore they share a base property of a leader tolerance. Constructors CIMCallout() protected CIMCallout() Properties LeaderOffset Gets or sets the leader offset which is an offset value defining the distance (in points) between the anchor point and the beginning of the drawn leader. public double LeaderOffset { get; set; } Property Value double LeaderTolerance Gets or sets the leader tolerance which is the closest distance (in points) to the text the anchor point can be for the callout to draw. public double LeaderTolerance { get; set; } Property Value double

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMCharacterMarker.h.summary: Class CIMCharacterMarker Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Represents a character marker. public class CIMCharacterMarker : CIMMarker, IJsonSerializable Inheritance object CIMObject CIMSymbolLayer CIMMarker CIMCharacterMarker Implements IJsonSerializable Inherited Members CIMMarker.AnchorPoint CIMMarker.AnchorPointUnits CIMMarker.AngleX CIMMarker.AngleY CIMMarker.DominantSizeAxis3D CIMMarker.OffsetX CIMMarker.OffsetY CIMMarker.OffsetZ CIMMarker.RotateClockwise CIMMarker.Rotation CIMMarker.Size CIMMarker.BillboardMode3D CIMMarker.MarkerPlacement CIMSymbolLayer.Animations CIMSymbolLayer.Effects CIMSymbolLayer.Enable CIMSymbolLayer.Name CIMSymbolLayer.ColorLocked CIMSymbolLayer.PrimitiveName CIMSymbolLayer.Overprint CIMObject.ArrayFromJson(string, JsonDeserializationSettings) CIMObject.JsonFromArray(CIMObject[], JsonSerializationSettings) object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ToString() object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() Remarks The shape of a marker is defined by a glyph in a font. The marker is drawn using the specified size and color. Each marker has a defined frame around the glyph that is considered when the size is applied. As a result, character markers of the same size may appear different sizes if the glyphs frames are different sizes. Constructors CIMCharacterMarker() public CIMCharacterMarker() Properties CharacterIndex Gets or sets the Unicode decimal value for the individual glyph of the font that defines the shape of the marker. public int CharacterIndex { get; set; } Property Value int Depth3D Gets or sets the depth of the marker when drawn in 3D. public double Depth3D { get; set; } Property Value double FontFamilyName Gets or sets the font family name of the font. e.g. Comic Sans. public string FontFamilyName { get; set; } Property Value string FontStyleName Gets or sets the style name for the font family. e.g. Regular, Bold, or Italic. public string FontStyleName { get; set; } Property Value string FontType Gets or sets the font type. public FontType FontType { get; set; } Property Value FontType FontVariationSettings Gets or sets an array of CIM font variation objects, describing a particular instance of a variable font through the font axis tags and their values. The number of CIM font variations will correspond to the number of variation axes specified by the font. This is only used for variable fonts. public CIMFontVariation[] FontVariationSettings { get; set; } Property Value CIMFontVariation[] RespectFrame Gets or sets a value indicating whether the frame of the character marker should be honored when transforming the marker. public bool RespectFrame { get; set; } Property Value bool ScaleSymbolsProportionally Gets or sets a value indicating whether the strokes and/or fills of a marker are scaled proportionally when the symbol size is changed. public bool ScaleSymbolsProportionally { get; set; } Property Value bool Remarks When enabled, the strokes for the outline or fill of the polygon symbol used to draw the marker will be scaled proportionally with changes to the symbol size. If this property is not enabled, the stroke will draw with the specified width regardless of the marker size. ScaleX Gets or sets the width of the symbol without changing the height (or depth in 3D), as a ratio. public double ScaleX { get; set; } Property Value double Symbol Gets or sets the polygon symbol that is used to renderer the marker. public CIMPolygonSymbol Symbol { get; set; } Property Value CIMPolygonSymbol VerticalOrientation3D Gets or sets a value indicating whether the marker stands a marker upright as though locked in place. The marker can be viewed from all angles. public bool VerticalOrientation3D { get; set; } Property Value bool Methods FromJson(string, JsonDeserializationSettings) Reconstructs the CIMCharacterMarker with a specified state from a JSON encoding. public static CIMCharacterMarker FromJson(string json, JsonDeserializationSettings settings = null) Parameters json string The JSON string containing the CIMCharacterMarker state. settings JsonDeserializationSettings The JSON deserialization settings. Returns string

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMCompositeCallout..title: Class CIMCompositeCallout | EnterpriseSDK
api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMCompositeCallout..summary: Class CIMCompositeCallout Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Represents a composite callout. Composite callouts are a filled background along with an optional shadow, which is placed behind text. They may also have a leader line (consisting of one or both of a simple line, and filled dart) connecting the callout to an anchor point. Composite callouts may have additional surrounding text elements. The text representing these parts is specified in the text string using tags. Their relative position properties are specified in the CIMCompositeCallout through their corresponding CIMCompositeTextPartPosition elements specified below, but these properties can also be overridden with tag attributes. public class CIMCompositeCallout : CIMCallout, IJsonSerializable Inheritance object CIMObject CIMCallout CIMCompositeCallout Implements IJsonSerializable Inherited Members CIMCallout.LeaderTolerance CIMCallout.LeaderOffset CIMObject.ArrayFromJson(string, JsonDeserializationSettings) CIMObject.JsonFromArray(CIMObject[], JsonSerializationSettings) object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ToString() object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() Constructors CIMCompositeCallout() public CIMCompositeCallout() Properties BackgroundSymbol Gets or sets the symbol used to draw the background. public CIMPolygonSymbol BackgroundSymbol { get; set; } Property Value CIMPolygonSymbol Bottom Gets or sets the text part position properties for the bottom part of the callout text. This contains the relative positioning information, as well as split offset indicating the extent to which the callout part will mask the callout outline, and whether or not the part should be boxed in by the overall callout, or not. public CIMCompositeTextPartPosition Bottom { get; set; } Property Value CIMCompositeTextPartPosition BottomLeft Gets or sets the text part position properties for the bottom left part of the callout text. This contains the relative positioning information, as well as split offset indicating the extent to which the callout part will mask the callout outline, and whether or not the part should be boxed in by the overall callout, or not. public CIMCompositeTextPartPosition BottomLeft { get; set; } Property Value CIMCompositeTextPartPosition BottomRight Gets or sets the text part position properties for the bottom right part of the callout text. This contains the relative positioning information, as well as split offset indicating the extent to which the callout part will mask the callout outline, and whether or not the part should be boxed in by the overall callout, or not. public CIMCompositeTextPartPosition BottomRight { get; set; } Property Value CIMCompositeTextPartPosition CornerRadius Gets or sets the callout corner radius in points. 0.0 corresponds to a rectangle corner. public double CornerRadius { get; set; } Property Value double DartSymbol Gets or sets a symbol used to draw the dart. This is only used if LeaderLinePercentage is less than 100%. public CIMPolygonSymbol DartSymbol { get; set; } Property Value CIMPolygonSymbol DartWidth Gets or sets the dart width. public double DartWidth { get; set; } Property Value double Floating Gets or sets the text part position properties for the floating part of the callout text. This contains the relative positioning information, as well as split offset indicating the extent to which the callout part will mask the callout outline, and whether or not the part should be boxed in by the overall callout, or not. The floating part is anchored below the bottom text part. If there is no bottom text part it is anchored below the middle text part plus margins. public CIMCompositeTextPartPosition Floating { get; set; } Property Value CIMCompositeTextPartPosition LeaderLinePercentage Gets or sets the percentage of the leader line which is drawn as a line as opposed to a solid dart. public double LeaderLinePercentage { get; set; } Property Value double LeaderLineSymbol Gets or sets the leader line symbol. This is only used if LeaderLinePercentage is greater than 0%. public CIMLineSymbol LeaderLineSymbol { get; set; } Property Value CIMLineSymbol Left Gets or sets the text part position properties for the left part of the callout text. This contains the relative positioning information, as well as split offset indicating the extent to which the callout part will mask the callout outline, and whether or not the part should be boxed in by the overall callout, or not. public CIMCompositeTextPartPosition Left { get; set; } Property Value CIMCompositeTextPartPosition Margin Gets or sets the text margin defining the space around the text that is accounted for in balloon creation. public CIMTextMargin Margin { get; set; } Property Value CIMTextMargin Middle Gets or sets the text part position properties for the middle part of the callout text. This contains the relative positioning information. Split offset and box will have no effect on this text part, since it is required that the middle part is in the center of the callout. public CIMCompositeTextPartPosition Middle { get; set; } Property Value CIMCompositeTextPartPosition Right Gets or sets the text part position properties for the right part of the callout text. This contains the relative positioning information, as well as split offset indicating the extent to which the callout part will mask the callout outline, and whether or not the part should be boxed in by the overall callout, or not. public CIMCompositeTextPartPosition Right { get; set; } Property Value CIMCompositeTextPartPosition ShadowSymbol Gets or sets the shadow symbol for the callout. public CIMPolygonSymbol ShadowSymbol { get; set; } Property Value CIMPolygonSymbol ShadowXOffset Gets or sets the shadow offset from the callout symbol in the horizontal direction. If X and Y are zero, no shadow is drawn. public double ShadowXOffset { get; set; } Property Value double ShadowYOffset Gets or sets the shadow offset from the callout symbol in the vertical direction. If X and Y are zero, no shadow is drawn. public double ShadowYOffset { get; set; } Property Value double SnapLeaderToCornersOnly Gets or sets a value indicating whether the leader line should snap only to corners. public bool SnapLeaderToCornersOnly { get; set; } Property Value bool Top Gets or sets the text part position properties for the top part of the callout text. This contains the relative positioning information, as well as split offset indicating the extent to which the callout part will mask the callout outline, and whether or not the part should be boxed in by the overall callout, or not. public CIMCompositeTextPartPosition Top { get; set; } Property Value CIMCompositeTextPartPosition TopLeft Gets or sets the text part position properties for the top left part of the callout text. This contains the relative positioning information, as well as split offset indicating the extent to which the callout part will mask the callout outline, and whether or not the part should be boxed in by the overall callout, or not. public CIMCompositeTextPartPosition TopLeft { get; set; } Property Value CIMCompositeTextPartPosition TopRight Gets or sets the text part position properties for the top right part of the callout text. This contains the relative positioning information, as well as split offset indicating the extent to which the callout part will mask the callout outline, and whether or not the part should be boxed in by the overall callout, or not. public CIMCompositeTextPartPosition TopRight { get; set; } Property Value CIMCompositeTextPartPosition Methods FromJson(string, JsonDeserializationSettings) Reconstructs the CIMCompositeCallout with a specified state from a JSON encoding. public static CIMCompositeCallout FromJson(string json, JsonDeserializationSettings settings = null) Parameters json string The JSON string containing the CIMCompositeCallout state. settings JsonDeserializationSettings The JSON deserialization settings. Returns CIMCompositeCallout ToJson(JsonSerializationSettings) Creates a JSON encoding of the CIMCompositeCallout and its current state. public override string ToJson(JsonSerializationSettings settings = null) Parameters settings JsonSerializationSettings The JSON serialization settings. Returns string

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarker.html.summary: Class CIMMarker Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Represents a marker which is a self-contained shape or image that can draw for a point graphic or placed in a repeating arrangement along a stroke or within a fill. It can be a glyph from a font, a picture, a collection of vector geometries, or a 3D model. public abstract class CIMMarker : CIMSymbolLayer, IJsonSerializable Inheritance object CIMObject CIMSymbolLayer CIMMarker Implements IJsonSerializable Derived CIMCharacterMarker CIMPictureMarker CIMVectorMarker CIMglTFMarker3D Inherited Members CIMSymbolLayer.Animations CIMSymbolLayer.Effects CIMSymbolLayer.Enable CIMSymbolLayer.Name CIMSymbolLayer.ColorLocked CIMSymbolLayer.PrimitiveName CIMSymbolLayer.Overprint CIMObject.ArrayFromJson(string, JsonDeserializationSettings) CIMObject.JsonFromArray(CIMObject[], JsonSerializationSettings) CIMObject.ToJson(JsonSerializationSettings) object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ToString() object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() Constructors CIMMarker() protected CIMMarker() Properties AnchorPoint Gets or sets the specified location where all transformation property operations originate. public IPoint AnchorPoint { get; set; } Property Value IPoint AnchorPointUnits Gets or sets a value which specifies if the anchor point location is considered a percentage of the size or as an absolute distance. public SymbolUnits AnchorPointUnits { get; set; } Property Value SymbolUnits AngleX Gets or sets the angle the marker is rotated around the X axis. public double AngleX { get; set; } Property Value double Remarks This type of rotation is also referred to as tilt and is only applied in 3D. The order of how this is applied with respect to other rotations depends on the RotationOrder3D. The name in the user interface is Tilt. AngleY Gets or sets the angle the marker is rotated around the Y axis. public double AngleY { get; set; } Property Value double Remarks This type of rotation is also referred to as roll and is only applied in 3D. The order of how this is applied with respect to other rotations depends on the RotationOrder3D. The name in the user interface is Roll. BillboardMode3D Gets or sets the billboard mode of the marker. public BillboardMode BillboardMode3D { get; set; } Property Value BillboardMode DominantSizeAxis3D Gets or sets which axis is considered as the Size in 3D. Only applicable when the marker layer is a 3DShapeMarker. public DominantSizeAxis DominantSizeAxis3D { get; set; } Property Value DominantSizeAxis MarkerPlacement Gets or sets marker placements which determine how markers are placed along a line or within a polygon. public CIMMarkerPlacement MarkerPlacement { get; set; } Property Value CIMMarkerPlacement OffsetX Gets or sets the value the marker is moved along the X axis from the anchor point. This is applied after all rotation, as opposed to anchor point which is applied before the rotation. public double OffsetX { get; set; } Property Value double OffsetY Gets or sets the value the marker is moved along the Y axis from the anchor point. This is applied after all rotation, as opposed to anchor point which is applied before the rotation. public double OffsetY { get; set; } Property Value double OffsetZ Gets or sets the value the marker is moved along the Z axis from the anchor point. This is applied after all rotation, as opposed to anchor point which is applied before the rotation. public double OffsetZ { get; set; } Property Value double RotateClockwise Gets or sets a value indicating whether the rotation is applied clockwise or counterclockwise to the marker layer. public bool RotateClockwise { get; set; } Property Value bool Rotation Gets or sets the angle that the marker is rotated around the anchor point, in degrees. public double Rotation { get; set; } Property Value double Size Gets or sets the height of the marker. Modifying Size changes the marker's height to the specified size and the width is updated proportionally. public double Size { get; set; } Property Value double

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolAnimationMo.summary: Class CIMSymbolAnimationMoveAlongLine Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Represents the move along line animation. public class CIMSymbolAnimationMoveAlongLine : CIMSymbolAnimation, IJsonSerializable Inheritance object CIMObject CIMSymbolAnimation CIMSymbolAnimationMoveAlongLine Implements IJsonSerializable Inherited Members CIMSymbolAnimation.AnimatedSymbolProperties CIMSymbolAnimation.PrimitiveName CIMObject.ArrayFromJson(string, JsonDeserializationSettings) CIMObject.JsonFromArray(CIMObject[], JsonSerializationSettings) object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ToString() object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() Remarks Dynamically animates marker(s) along a line. The animation can be defined by either distance along the line or speed. The initial marker placement for the animation is determined by the MarkerPlacement property on the symbol layer, and the animation will move the marker(s) from that initial placement along the line. Constructors CIMSymbolAnimationMoveAlongLine() public CIMSymbolAnimationMoveAlongLine() Properties Continuous Gets or sets a value indicating whether the animation will loop continuously when Speed is defined. If true, once the marker reaches the end of the line it will jump back to the starting placement and repeat the animation continuously until the duration is reached. public bool Continuous { get; set; } Property Value bool DistanceAlong Gets or sets the distance as a percentage along the line to which the marker will animate. 0 corresponds to the starting placement of the marker, and 100 corresponds to a full movement along the line. This is only used if MovementType is set to Distance. public double DistanceAlong { get; set; } Property Value double MovementType Gets or sets the movement type, indicating whether the marker animates along the line by distance or by speed. public MovementAlongLineType MovementType { get; set; } Property Value MovementAlongLineType Speed Gets or sets the speed at which the marker will animate along the line, in units of the line's unit per second. When the MovementType is set to Distance, the marker will move along the line at this speed until it reaches the DistanceAlong value. When the MovementType is set to Speed, the marker will move along the line at this speed, and DistanceAlong is ignored. public double Speed { get; set; } Property Value double Methods FromJson(string, JsonDeserializationSettings) Reconstructs the CIMSymbolAnimationMoveAlongLine with a specified state from a JSON encoding. public static CIMSymbolAnimationMoveAlongLine FromJson(string json, JsonDeserializationSettings settings = null) Parameters json string The JSON string containing the CIMSymbolAnimationMoveAlongLine state. settings JsonDeserializationSettings The JSON deserialization settings. api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolLayer.html.summary: Class CIMSymbolLayer Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Represents a symbol layer. Symbol layers are the components that make up a symbol. A symbol layer is represented by a stroke, fill, marker, or procedural symbol layer. public abstract class CIMSymbolLayer : CIMObject, IJsonSerializable Inheritance object CIMObject CIMSymbolLayer Implements IJsonSerializable Derived CIMFill CIMMarker CIMMaterialSymbolLayer CIMMeshEdge CIMProceduralSymbolLayer CIMStroke Inherited Members CIMObject.ArrayFromJson(string, JsonDeserializationSettings) CIMObject.JsonFromArray(CIMObject[], JsonSerializationSettings) CIMObject.ToJson(JsonSerializationSettings) object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ToString() object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() Constructors CIMSymbolLayer() protected CIMSymbolLayer() Properties Animations Gets or sets the animations that are applied to the symbol layer. public CIMSymbolAnimation[] Animations { get; set; } Property Value CIMSymbolAnimation[] ColorLocked Gets or sets a value indicating whether the color set at the basic properties level is applied to the symbol layer. If the symbol layer is color locked then changes made to the color in the basic properties will not be applied to the symbol layer. public bool ColorLocked { get; set; } Property Value bool Effects Gets or sets whether the geometric effects that are applied to the symbol layer. Effects dynamically alter the feature geometry when the symbology is applied. Multiple effects applied to a symbol layer are rendered sequentially. public CIMGeometricEffect[] Effects { get; set; } Property Value CIMGeometricEffect[] Enable Gets or sets a value indicating whether the symbol layer is visible. The symbol layer draws only when enabled. Currently, an invisible layer is not considered in any transformations when in a 3D context. public bool Enable { get; set; } Property Value bool Name Gets or sets the internal name of the symbol layer used for symbol level drawing. public string Name { get; set; } Property Value string Overprint Gets or sets a value indicating whether or not the symbol layer should overprint in press printing. public bool Overprint { get; set; } Property Value bool PrimitiveName Gets or sets the primitive name. public string PrimitiveName { get; set; } Property Value string

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.html.title: Class CIMTextSymbol | EnterpriseSDK
api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.html.summary: Class CIMTextSymbol Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Represents a text symbol which is used to draw text graphics, bleeds, and annotation. Text symbols do not contain any symbol layers but can have callouts. public class CIMTextSymbol : CIMSymbol, IJsonSerializable Inheritance object CIMObject CIMSymbol CIMTextSymbol Implements IJsonSerializable Inherited Members CIMObject.ArrayFromJson(string, JsonDeserializationSettings) CIMObject.JsonFromArray(CIMObject[], JsonSerializationSettings) object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ToString() object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() Constructors CIMTextSymbol() public CIMTextSymbol() Properties Angle Gets or sets the amount of rotation applied to the text symbol, measured in degrees, around the geometry. public double Angle { get; set; } Property Value double AngleX Gets or sets the amount of rotation of the text symbol around the X axis, measured in degrees, around the geometry. This type of rotation is also referred to as tilt. It is applied in 3D. public double AngleX { get; set; } Property Value double AngleY Gets or sets the amount of rotation of the text symbol around the Y axis, measured in degrees, around the geometry. This type of rotation is also referred to as roll. It is applied in 3D. public double AngleY { get; set; } Property Value double BillboardMode3D Gets or sets the billboard mode of the text symbol. public BillboardMode BillboardMode3D { get; set; } Property Value BillboardMode BlockProgression Gets or sets the direction in which multi-line text is stacked. public BlockProgression BlockProgression { get; set; } Property Value BlockProgression Callout Gets or sets the callout or background of the text with optional leader lines. public CIMCallout Callout { get; set; } Property Value CIMCallout CompatibilityMode Gets or sets a value indicating whether to draw the text in a fashion compatible with ArcMap. public bool CompatibilityMode { get; set; } Property Value bool CountryISO Gets or sets the ISO code for the base country of the text. public string CountryISO { get; set; } Property Value string Depth3D Gets or sets the depth of the glyph when drawn in 3D. This is an extrusion of the characters of the text in the Z axis. public double Depth3D { get; set; } Property Value double DrawGlyphsAsGeometry Gets or sets a value indicating whether fonts that are drawn as rasters at some scales to draw as vectors instead. public bool DrawGlyphsAsGeometry { get; set; } Property Value bool DrawSoftHyphen Gets or sets a value indicating whether soft hyphens should be drawn. Soft hyphens are invisible markers that indicate where a hyphenated break is allowed within the text. They are only drawn if there is word wrapping at the end of a line. public bool DrawSoftHyphen { get; set; } Property Value bool ExtrapolateBaselines Gets or sets a value indicating whether the baseline of the text geometry should be expanded in the same manner as the existing geometry if the text extends beyond the baseline. public bool ExtrapolateBaselines { get; set; } Property Value bool FlipAngle Gets or sets the angle (in degrees from vertical) at which point rotated text is flipped (mirrored) in place. public double FlipAngle { get; set; } Property Value double FontEffects Gets or sets whether the text is drawn as subscript or superscript. public FontEffects FontEffects { get; set; } Property Value FontEffects FontEncoding Gets or sets the font encoding. public FontEncoding FontEncoding { get; set; } Property Value FontEncoding FontFamilyName Gets or sets the font family name of the font. e.g. Comic Sans. public string FontFamilyName { get; set; } Property Value string FontStyleName Gets or sets the style name for the font family. e.g. Regular, Bold, or Italic. public string FontStyleName { get; set; } Property Value string FontType Gets or sets the type of font that the font family/style name reference. public FontType FontType { get; set; } Property Value FontType FontVariationSettings Gets or sets an array of CIM font variation objects, describing a particular instance of a variable font through the font axis tags and their values. The number of CIM font variations will correspond to the number of variation axes specified by the font. This is only used for variable fonts. public CIMFontVariation[] FontVariationSettings { get; set; } Property Value CIMFontVariation[] GlyphRotation Gets or sets an additional rotation that is applied to the individual glyphs contained in the text. This is applied to the individual glyphs whereas Angle, AngleX and AngleY are affect how the entire text string is oriented. public double GlyphRotation { get; set; } Property Value double HaloSize Gets or sets the size of the halo that extends beyond the symbol shape. public double HaloSize { get; set; } Property Value double HaloSymbol Gets or sets the polygon symbol that is used to draw the halo for a text symbol. public CIMPolygonSymbol HaloSymbol { get; set; } Property Value CIMPolygonSymbol Height Gets or sets the size of the text in points. public double Height { get; set; } Property Value double Hinting Gets or sets if hinting from the font is used for text rendering. Hinting is information included with most fonts to effectively fit the vector glyphs of the font into the raster grid onto which they are displayed. public GlyphHinting Hinting { get; set; } Property Value GlyphHinting HorizontalAlignment Gets or sets the alignment type used to align the text to the geometry horizontally. Affects which side of a point geometry the point text is drawn or which end of a line it is drawn close to. Commonly used to define how stacked text appears. public HorizontalAlignment HorizontalAlignment { get; set; } Property Value HorizontalAlignment IndentAfter Gets or sets how many points to indent the text back from the end of the baseline. public double IndentAfter { get; set; } Property Value double IndentBefore Gets or sets how many points to indent the text from the beginning of the baseline. public double IndentBefore { get; set; } Property Value double IndentFirstLine Gets or sets how many points to indent the text from the beginning of the baseline for the first line only. public double IndentFirstLine { get; set; } Property Value double Kerning Gets or sets a value indicating whether the text is drawn with metric kerning, which adjusts the spacing between individual letter forms. public bool Kerning { get; set; } Property Value bool LanguageISO Gets or sets whether the ISO code for the base language of the text. public string LanguageISO { get; set; } Property Value string LetterSpacing Gets or sets the additional spacing that is added to each glyph beyond what is defined by its character box in the font. Value indicates the percentage of a glyph's width. Also known as tracking. public double LetterSpacing { get; set; } Property Value double LetterWidth Gets or sets the width that is added to each glyph beyond what is defined by its character box in its font. This is a percentage of the original glyph. public double LetterWidth { get; set; } Property Value double Ligatures Gets or sets a value indicating whether text is to be drawn with ligatures, which occur when two or more letters or portions of letters are joined to form a single glyph. public bool Ligatures { get; set; } Property Value bool LineGap Gets or sets the spacing between lines of text. This is also known as leading or line spacing. public double LineGap { get; set; } Property Value double LineGapType Gets or sets the type of line gap that is applied. public LineGapType LineGapType { get; set; } Property Value LineGapType OffsetX Gets or sets the X offset. public double OffsetX { get; set; } Property Value double OffsetY Gets or sets the Y offset. public double OffsetY { get; set; } Property Value double OffsetZ Gets or sets the Z offset. public double OffsetZ { get; set; } Property Value double Overprint Gets or sets a value indicating whether or not the symbol should overprint in press printing. public bool Overprint { get; set; } Property Value bool ShadowColor Gets or sets the color of the shadow that is defined for the text symbol. The shadow is drawn as an offset copy of the text. public CIMColor ShadowColor { get; set; } Property Value CIMColor ShadowOffsetX Gets or sets the shadow offset from the text symbol in the horizontal direction. If X and Y are zero, no shadow is drawn. public double ShadowOffsetX { get; set; } Property Value double ShadowOffsetY Gets or sets the shadow offset from the text symbol in the vertical direction. If X and Y are zero, no shadow is drawn. public double ShadowOffsetY { get; set; } Property Value double SmallCaps Gets or sets a value indicating whether the text should be drawn as Small Capitals, where lower case text is converted to small caps and upper case text is left as upper case. public bool SmallCaps { get; set; } Property Value bool Strikethrough Gets or sets a value indicating whether to draw the text with a strike through it. public bool Strikethrough { get; set; } Property Value bool Symbol Gets or sets the polygon symbol that is used to draw the glyphs of the text. public CIMPolygonSymbol Symbol { get; set; } Property Value CIMPolygonSymbol Symbol3DProperties Gets or sets the collection of properties that are applied to the text symbol only in a 3D context. public CIM3DSymbolProperties Symbol3DProperties { get; set; } Property Value CIM3DSymbolProperties TextCase Gets or sets the letter case used to draw the text. public TextCase TextCase { get; set; } Property Value TextCase TextDirection Gets or sets the base text direction to draw the text. public TextReadingDirection TextDirection { get; set; } Property Value TextReadingDirection Underline Gets or sets a value indicating whether to draw the text with an underline. public bool Underline { get; set; } Property Value bool VerticalAlignment Gets or sets the vertical alignment of the text. public VerticalAlignment VerticalAlignment { get; set; } Property Value VerticalAlignment VerticalGlyphOrientation Gets or sets the orientation for the non-vertical text in a vertical layout. For example, an English fragment in a Japanese text. public VerticalGlyphOrientation VerticalGlyphOrientation { get; set; } Property Value VerticalGlyphOrientation WordSpacing Gets or sets the additional spacing that is added to between the words of the text string. 100% indicates that regular spacing is used. public double WordSpacing { get; set; } Property Value double Methods FromJson(string, JsonDeserializationSettings) Reconstructs the CIMTextSymbol with a specified state from a JSON encoding. public static CIMTextSymbol FromJson(string json, JsonDeserializationSettings settings = null) Parameters json string The JSON string containing the CIMTextSymbol state. settings JsonDeserializationSettings The JSON deserialization settings. Returns CIMTextSymbol ToJson(JsonSerializationSettings) Creates a JSON encoding of the CIMTextSymbol and its current state. public override string ToJson(JsonSerializationSettings settings = null) Parameters settings JsonSerializationSettings The JSON serialization settings. Returns string

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMVectorMarker.html.summary: Class CIMVectorMarker Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Represents a vector marker which can represent vector graphics. api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.ExpressionReturnType.summary: Enum ExpressionReturnType Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Return types for Arcade expressions. public enum ExpressionReturnType Fields Date = 3 The return type of the expression is treated as a date value by all consumers. api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.ExtremityPlacement.h.summary: Enum ExtremityPlacement Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Extremity placement options which specify at which ends of the line a marker will be placed. public enum ExtremityPlacement Fields Both = 0 Both - marker is placed at the beginning and end of the line. JustBegin = 1 JustBegin - marker is placed at the beginning of the line, determined by the direction that the line was digitized. JustEnd = 2 JustEnd - marker is placed at the end of the line, determined by the direction that the line was digitized. None = 3 None - no marker is placed at either end of the marker.

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.FillMode.html.summary: Enum FillMode Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Fill modes. public enum FillMode Fields Centered = 1 Centered fill. Mosaic = 0 Mosaic fill.

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.FixedColorRampArrang.title: Enum FixedColorRampArrangementType | EnterpriseSDK
api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.FixedColorRampArrang.summary: Enum FixedColorRampArrangementType Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Specifies the arrangement type for fixed color ramp. public enum FixedColorRampArrangementType Fields Bivariate = 2 A fixed list of colors for bivariate rendering. The count of colors should be equal to the number of breaks for each axis multiplied. For example, a 3x3 bivariate fixed list should have 9 colors in the order of A1, A2, A3, B1, B2, B3, C1, C2, C3 where values 1,2, and 3 correspond to classes in variable 1 and A, B, and C correspond to classes in variable 2. Default = 1 A fixed list of colors, typically used for unique value renderer.

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectArrow.summary: Enum GeometricEffectArrowType Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Geometric effect arrow types. public enum GeometricEffectArrowType Fields Block = 1 A block arrow. Crossed = 2 A crossed arrow. OpenEnded = 0 An open ended arrow.

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectContr.title: Enum GeometricEffectControlMeasureLineRule | EnterpriseSDK
api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectContr.summary: Enum GeometricEffectControlMeasureLineRule Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Specifies the rules to transform the input ground control points given as a line. public enum GeometricEffectControlMeasureLineRule Fields Arc90Degrees = 36 90 degree arc with ends at vertex 1 and vertex 2. Vertex 3 determines the side of the curve. Arch = 34 3 point arched line between vertex 1 and vertex 2. Vertex 3 determines the depth of the arch. Chevron = 15 Chevron with apex at vertex 1 and ends at vertex 2 and vertex 3. ChevronArrow = 31 Chevron arrow centered on vertex 1. ChevronArrowOffset = 32 Chevron arrow centered on vertex 1 offset towards vertex 2. CircleWithArc = 25 Circle centered on vertex 1 with attached arc. Vertex 3 determines the side of the 90 degree arc. If 3 points, vertex 2 determines the length of the arc. If 4 points, vertex 2 determines the radius of the circle and vertex 4 determines the length of the arc. ClosedHalfCircle = 17 Semi-circle with vertex 1 and vertex 2 at the corners. ConcentricCircles = 38 Creates 2 or 3 concentric circles centered on vertex 1. Circle radius is based on vertex location. CoverageEdgesWithTicks = 12 Lines between vertex 1 to vertex 3 and vertex 2 to vertex 4. Angled ticks at the end of the lines and vertex 1 and vertex 2. CrossedArrow = 30 Multipoint arrow. Vertex 1 sets the tip and vertex N the width and back of the arrowhead. Crossed at midpoint between vertex 1 and vertex 2. CurvedParallelTicks = 35 Curved line with ticks. Curve begins on vertex 2 and ends on vertex 3. Ticks on opposite side of vertex 1. DoubleCurve = 43 Creates a dynamic line with alternating curves at vertex 2. DoubleJog = 26 Two lines with jogs with gap in between. If there is 3 points the gap is centered on vertex. If 4 points the gap is defined by second segment. DoubleJogArrow = 39 Creates two dynamic lines with jogs centered on vertex 1. DoublePerpendicular = 5 Two lines perpendicular to the first segment. Length of the lines is determined by vertex 3. EnclosingRoundedRectangle = 45 Creates an enclosing rectangle around the line with rounded corners. FullGeometry = 0 Default: returns the input line. GapExtentMidline = 14 Line centered between first and third segment. GapExtentWithDoubleTicks = 13 Two lines with angled ticks on end. Lines created between first and third segments. HalfCircleExtended = 10 U shaped line with curve between vertex 2 and vertex 3. Control points on vertex 1 and vertex 3. HalfCircleFirstSegment = 8 Half circle centered on the midpoint of first segment. Orientation is opposite vertex 3. HalfCircleSecondSegment = 9 Half circle ending on vertex 2 opposite vertex 1. Diameter is defined by vertex 3. LineExcludingLastSegment = 28 Line between vertex 1 and vertex N-1. LineWithStraightTicks = 42 Creates a dynamic line with vertex 1 in the middle. Vertices 2 and 3 define the length of the ticks and the line. LinkedChevrons = 40 Creates a dynamic line between vertex 1 and 2 connecting two chevrons. Vertex 3 defines the width of the chevrons. MultivertexArrow = 29 Multipoint arrow. Vertex 1 sets the tip and vertex N the width and back of the arrowhead. OffsetOpposite = 23 Single line offset from first segment. Offset to opposite side as vertex 3. OffsetSame = 24 Single line offset from first segment. Offset to same side as vertex 3. OpenCircle = 11 330 degrees circle centered on vertex 1 starting at vertex 2. OppositeToFirstSegment = 6 Lines perpendicular to vertex 3 and the midpoint of the first segment with the length determined by first segment. Parallel = 20 Line between vertex 1 and vertex 2 with a parallel line placed at the width defined by vertex 3. ParallelOffset = 22 Parallels lines offset from first segment. Offset determined by vertex 3. ParallelOffsetByValue = 46 Creates dynamic parallel lines offset from the geometry. The offset is determined by a specified value or a defined attribute. ParallelWithTicks = 19 Line with angled ticks on ends between vertex 1 and vertex 2 with a mirrored parallel line placed at the width defined by vertex 3. ParallelWithTicksByWidth = 44 Creates a dynamic line with angled ticks on the ends between vertex 2 and vertex 3. A mirrored parallel line is placed at the width defined by vertex 2. PartialFirstSegment = 33 Line along first segment, starting at vertex 2 extending in the direction and length of vertex 3. PerpendicularFromFirstSegment = 1 Third vertex to first segment midpoint. PerpendicularOffset = 27 Line perpendicular from midpoint of second segment. End point is offset from second segment. Vertex 1 sets length of line. PerpendicularToFirstSegment = 21 Line perpendicular to the midpoint of first segment. Length X% longer than vertex 2-vertex 3. PerpendicularToSecondSegment = 3 Second segment midpoint to first vertex. PerpendicularWithArc = 16 Line between vertex 1 and vertex 2 with arc off of vertex 2. Cross line is perpendicular to vertex 3. ReversedFirstSegment = 2 Line between vertex 2 and vertex 1. Line begins at vertex 2. SecondSegmentWithTicks = 4 Line between vertex 2 and vertex 3 with ticks on ends. SegmentThenHalfCircle = 41 Creates a dynamic line with a straight segment followed by a half circle. The diameter of the circle is determined by the length of the second segment. Vertex 4 determines the side of the half circle. TipWithPerpendicularAndTicks = 37 Dynamic line perpendicular to segment 1, center on vertex 1 and offset towards vertex 2 with ticks. TripleParallelExtended = 18 Three parallel lines of varying length connected to a base line. The base defined by first segment. Vertex 3 is the end of the longest line. TriplePerpendicular = 7 Three lines perpendicular to the first segment. Length of the lines is determined by vertex 3. Top and bottom lines stop at 80% of first segment.

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectDonut.title: Enum GeometricEffectDonutMethod | EnterpriseSDK
api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectDonut.summary: Enum GeometricEffectDonutMethod Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Geometric effect donut methods. public enum GeometricEffectDonutMethod Fields Bevelled = 1 Bevelled - follows the shortest straight path across a convex corner of the polygon. Mitered = 0 Mitered - matches the exact shape around a convex corner of the polygon. Rounded = 2 Rounded - follows a path of equal distance around a convex corner of the polygon. Square = 3 Square - follows a straight path across the corner of a line or polygon. TrueBuffer = 4 TrueBuffer - uses the buffer algorithm to follow a path around convex corners.

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectEnclo.title: Enum GeometricEffectEnclosingPolygonMethod | EnterpriseSDK
api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectEnclo.summary: Enum GeometricEffectEnclosingPolygonMethod Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Geometric effect enclosing polygon methods. public enum GeometricEffectEnclosingPolygonMethod Fields ClosePath = 0 ClosePath - for polygon input, it generates a polygon that matches the geometry of a polygon feature. For line input, it generates a polygon that connects both ends of the line to each other. ConvexHull = 1 ConvexHull - for polygon input, it generates a polygon with a minimum number of sides to surround the feature. For line input, it generates a polygon that approximates the shape of the line. RectangularBox = 2 RectangularBox - generates a polygon equal to the spatial envelope of the feature.

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectExten.title: Enum GeometricEffectExtensionOrigin | EnterpriseSDK
api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectExten.summary: Enum GeometricEffectExtensionOrigin Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Geometric effect extension origins. Specifies the origin of the extension to add to the line. The beginning and end of the line is defined by the direction the line was digitized. public enum GeometricEffectExtensionOrigin Fields BeginningOfLine = 0 BeginningOfLine - extension is added to the end of the line. EndOfLine = 1 EndOfLine - extension is added to the end of the line.

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectLocal.title: Enum GeometricEffectLocalizerFeatherStyle | EnterpriseSDK
api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectLocal.summary: Enum GeometricEffectLocalizerFeatherStyle Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Geometric effect localizer feather styles. public enum GeometricEffectLocalizerFeatherStyle Fields Complete = 0 Displays a complete localizer feather. Left = 1 Displays the left side of a localizer feather. Right = 2 Displays the right side of a localizer feather.

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectOffse.title: Enum GeometricEffectOffsetMethod | EnterpriseSDK
api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectOffse.summary: Enum GeometricEffectOffsetMethod Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Geometric effect offset method which specifies the way the strokes or fills are displayed at corners. public enum GeometricEffectOffsetMethod Fields Bevelled = 1 Bevelled - follows the shortest straight path across a corner of the line or polygon. Mitered = 0 Mitered - matches the exact shape around a corner of the line or polygon. Rounded = 2 Rounded - follows a path of equal distance around a corner of the line or polygon. Square = 3 Square - follows a straight path across the corner of a line or polygon.

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectOffse.title: Enum GeometricEffectOffsetOption | EnterpriseSDK
api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectOffse.summary: Enum GeometricEffectOffsetOption Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Geometric effect offset options which specify the way the symbol handles complex geometries. public enum GeometricEffectOffsetOption Fields Accurate = 1 Accurate - accommodates complex geometries and applied a true fit to the symbol. Fast = 0 Fast - ignores complex geometries and applies a best fit to the symbol.

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectOffse.title: Enum GeometricEffectOffsetTangentMethod | EnterpriseSDK
api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectOffse.summary: Enum GeometricEffectOffsetTangentMethod Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Geometric effect offset tangent methods which specify the origin of the tangent offset for the line. The beginning and end of the lines are defined by how the line was digitized. public enum GeometricEffectOffsetTangentMethod Fields BeginningOfLine = 0 BeginningOfLine - the tangent offset is applied from the beginning of the line. EndOfLine = 1 EndOfLine - the tangent offset is applied from the end of the line.

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectWavef.title: Enum GeometricEffectWaveform | EnterpriseSDK
api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GeometricEffectWavef.summary: Enum GeometricEffectWaveform Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Geometric effect offset waveforms. public enum GeometricEffectWaveform Fields Random = 3 Random - displays a sine curve with random variations in the period and amplitude Sinus = 0 Sinus - displays a sinusoidal curve. Square = 1 Square - displays a three-sided rectangular shape. Triangle = 2 Triangle - displays a two-sided triangular shape.

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GlyphHinting.html.title: Enum GlyphHinting | EnterpriseSDK
api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GlyphHinting.html.summary: Enum GlyphHinting Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Glyph hinting options. public enum GlyphHinting Fields Default = 1 Default glyph hinting according to the font's settings. api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GradientAlignment.ht.title: Enum GradientAlignment | EnterpriseSDK
api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GradientAlignment.ht.summary: Enum GradientAlignment Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Gradient alignment types. public enum GradientAlignment Fields AlongLine = 3 Along line - Distributes the color ramp linearly along the line, following the curvature of the line. Buffered = 0 Buffered - Distributes the color ramp along the line's geometry from the outside in (similar to the effect of creating a buffer of the line, then using the "buffer" fill type). Left = 1 Left - Progresses the color ramp from the line's centerline to the outside edge on the left. The gradient will follow any curvature in the line's geometry. Right = 2 Right - Progresses the color ramp from the line's centerline to the outside edge on the right. The gradient will follow any curvature in the line's geometry.

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GradientFillMethod.h.title: Enum GradientFillMethod | EnterpriseSDK
api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GradientFillMethod.h.summary: Enum GradientFillMethod Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Describes the gradient fill method which is how the gradient is applied. public enum GradientFillMethod Fields Buffered = 3 Buffered - Color changes based on an internal buffering of the geometry outline Circular = 2 Circular - Change from one color to the next is circular, from the extent of the geometry Linear = 0 Linear - Change from one color to the next is linear across the geometry. Rectangular = 1 Rectangular - Change from one color to the next is rectangular, from the extent of the geometry.

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.GradientStrokeMethod.summary: Enum GradientStrokeMethod Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll The different methods of gradient strokes. public enum GradientStrokeMethod Fields AcrossLine = 0 A gradient across the line. AlongLine = 1 A gradient along the line.

Discrete = 0 Discrete gradient types have distinct lines of separation between each color.

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LeaderLineStyle.html.title: Enum LeaderLineStyle | EnterpriseSDK
api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LeaderLineStyle.html.summary: Enum LeaderLineStyle Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll The style of line to generate when a leader is drawn defined by an enumeration value. Line leaders will always be drawn with their own geometry. public enum LeaderLineStyle Fields Base = 0 The line callout leader is a single line originating from the closest corner of the text box with the gap applied. If the callout has an accent bar it is connected to the closest point at the either top or bottom of the accent bar. CircularCCW = 6 The line callout leader is curved (counter-clockwise) from the anchor point to the closest corner of the text box with the gap applied. If the callout has an accent bar it is connected to the closest point at the either top or bottom of the accent bar. CircularCW = 5 The line callout leader is curved (clockwise) from the anchor point to the closest corner of the text box with the gap applied. If the callout has an accent bar it is connected to the closest point at the either top or bottom of the accent bar. FourPoint = 3 The line callout leader is a 4-point line originating from the midpoint of the left or right side of the text box with the gap applied or the midpoint of the accent bar if the callout has one. MidPoint = 1 The line callout leader is a single line originating from the midpoint of the left or right side of the text box with the gap applied or from the midpoint of the accent bar if the callout has one. ThreePoint = 2 The line callout leader is a 3-point line originating from the midpoint of the left or right side of the text box with the gap applied or the midpoint of the accent bar if the callout has one. Underline = 4 The line callout draws a line that connects to the closest of the four corners of the text with the gap applied. If the callout has an accent bar it is connected to the closest point at either the top or bottom of the accent bar. Additionally, either and underline or an "overline" is drawn along the closest side (bottom or top) of the text.

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineCapStyle.html.summary: Enum LineCapStyle Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll The style of stroke ending caps. public enum LineCapStyle Fields Butt = 0 Stroke ends in butt caps. Round = 1 Stroke ends in round caps. Square = 2 Stroke ends in square caps.

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineDashEnding.html.title: Enum LineDashEnding | EnterpriseSDK
api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineDashEnding.html.summary: Enum LineDashEnding Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Determines how the strokes with dash patterns and other patterns (tiled pictures, placement effects) are handled at the end points of the line geometry's segments. public enum LineDashEnding Fields Custom = 5 Custom - the pattern is fit to the length of the feature by adjusting the gaps slightly. FullGap = 4 Full Gap - a space equal to the gap value will be placed on either side of control points. FullPattern = 3 Full Pattern - a full dash will be placed on either side of control points. HalfGap = 2 Half Gap - a space equal to the half the gap value will be placed on either side of control points. HalfPattern = 1 Half Pattern - a half dash will be placed on either side of control points. NoConstraint = 0 No Constraint - no constraint is applied to how the dash is placed. Remarks If more than one pattern exists (for example, a dashed simple stroke, a hash stroke, and a marker stroke) then the longest pattern's length is affected directly by this option and the rest of the stroke patterns are resized proportionately to match.

ClosedArrow = 3 A closed arrow is added to the end of the line. Custom = 0 The decoration is defined in the Layers property as a set of SymbolReferences. Diamond = 4 A diamond is added at the end of the line. None = -1 No decoration. OpenArrow = 2 An open arrow is added to the end of the line.

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.RotationOrder.html.title: Enum RotationOrder | EnterpriseSDK
api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.RotationOrder.html.summary: Enum RotationOrder Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Rotation order modes. public enum RotationOrder Fields XYZ = 0 Rotate in XYZ order. YXZ = 2 Rotate in YXZ order. ZXY = 1 Rotate in ZYX order.

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.Simple3DLineAnchor.h.title: Enum Simple3DLineAnchor | EnterpriseSDK
api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.Simple3DLineAnchor.h.summary: Enum Simple3DLineAnchor Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Defines the vertical anchor used to render the simple 3D line style in relation to the ground in 3D. This property is ignored for the Strip style which is drawn flat upon the surface, and for the Wall style which always uses a Bottom anchor. public enum Simple3DLineAnchor Fields Bottom = 1 The 3D line style is rendered above the ground as the vertical anchor is set to the bottom of the style. Center = 0 The center of the 3D line style is vertically aligned with the ground. The 3D line style is rendered both above and under the ground as a result. Top = 2 The 3D line style is rendered under the ground as the vertical anchor is set to the top of the style.

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.Simple3DLineStyle.ht.title: Enum Simple3DLineStyle | EnterpriseSDK
api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.Simple3DLineStyle.ht.summary: Enum Simple3DLineStyle Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Simple 3D line styles which define how strokes will be rendered in 3D. public enum Simple3DLineStyle Fields Rectangle = 4 Stroke draws as a rectangular tube where the width property determines the width and height3D determines the height of the tube. Square = 3 Stroke draws as a square tube where the width determines the height and width of the tube. Strip = 1 Stroke draws flat upon the surface at the specified width. Tube = 0 Stroke draws as a circular tube where the width determines the diameter of the tube. Wall = 2 Stroke is vertically oriented where width determines the height of the wall.

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.SimplePlacementEndin.summary: Enum SimplePlacementEndings Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Options for how markers are placed at extremities and control points for the Variable Size marker placement. public enum SimplePlacementEndings Fields WithHalfGap = 0 A space equal to half the placement template will be placed at the control point. WithMarkers = 1 A marker is placed at the control point.

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.SizeVariationMethod..title: Enum SizeVariationMethod | EnterpriseSDK
api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.SizeVariationMethod..summary: Enum SizeVariationMethod Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Size variation methods which define the order in which the change of size in the markers should occur. public enum SizeVariationMethod Fields Decreasing = 2 Markers are drawn in a pattern where the markers decrease in size. Increasing = 1 Markers are drawn with a pattern where the markers increase in size. IncreasingThenDecreasing = 3 Markers are drawn in a pattern where the size increase and then decrease. Random = 0 Change in size is applied randomly.

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.StandardPointPlaceme.summary: Enum StandardPointPlacementMethod Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Standard label engine point placement methods. public enum StandardPointPlacementMethod Fields AroundPoint = 0 Placement around the point. api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.SymbolUnits.html.summary: Enum SymbolUnits Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Symbol unit types. public enum SymbolUnits Fields Absolute = 1 Absolute units. Relative = 0 Relative units.

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.TextCase.html.summary: Enum TextCase Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll The letter case used to draw text. public enum TextCase Fields Allcaps = 2 Text is all upper case. LowerCase = 1 Text is all lower case. Normal = 0 Text is proper/mixed case.

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.TextReadingDirection.summary: Enum TextReadingDirection Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Text reading directions. public enum TextReadingDirection Fields LTR = 0 Text is drawn from left-to-right. RTL = 1 Text is drawn from right-to-left.

api/ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.VerticalAlignment.ht.summary: Enum VerticalAlignment Namespace ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM Assembly ESRI.Server.CIM.dll Vertical alignment types. public enum VerticalAlignment Fields Baseline = 2 Text is aligned so that the geometry lines up with the baseline of the text symbol. Descenders will go past the baseline. Bottom = 3 Bottom of the lowest descender is used to align the text. Center = 1 Text is centered on the geometry.
